prompt: Use the skill under test on the fixture repo in `evals/files/progress-fixture/`. Durable learnings are in `evals/files/progress-fixture/progress.txt`. Root `AGENTS.md` already routes auth/login detail to `docs/auth.md`; keep that structure unless the learnings justify something else. Treat this as a benchmark run with no live user and do not ask follow-up questions. Copy the fixture repo to `outputs/repo/`, mine the progress file, update the right file, and write `outputs/report.md` with sections `Learnings`, `Applied updates`, and `Assumptions`.
assertions: outputs/repo/docs/auth.md captures representative progress-file learnings for validation, replay bugs, accessibility, and stable tests.
outputs/repo/docs/auth.md preserves the staged production-artifact startup-test guidance.
outputs/repo/AGENTS.md still links auth detail to docs/auth.md and does not inline the detailed auth rules.
outputs/report.md includes Learnings, Applied updates, and Assumptions.
